title: NinetailedProfile
description: A Ninetailed visitor profile containing identity, behavioral, session, and location data used for personalization and A/B test variant assignment.

id.description: Unique identifier for the visitor profile.

stableId.description: Stable cross-session identifier for the visitor, persisted via cookie.

random.description: Random float (0-1) used for deterministic traffic splitting in A/B tests.

audiences.description: List of audience IDs the visitor currently qualifies for.

traits.description: Merged identify traits from all identify events for this visitor.

jurisdiction.description: Regulatory jurisdiction code (e.g. GDPR, CCPA) resolved from visitor location.

stickyVariants.description: Map of experience ID to variant index for sticky (consistent) variant assignment.

Location.description: Geographic location resolved from the visitor's IP address.

isReturningVisitor.description: True if the visitor has been seen in a previous session.

landingPage.description: URL of the first page visited in this session.

count.description: Total number of sessions this visitor has had.

sessionLength.description: Length of the current session in seconds.
